title: Spiced Paella Potato Fritters
description: A twist on traditional Indian street food, these crispy fritters combine the flavors of Indian spices with the warmth of paella.
instructions: 1. Boil the robust and russet potatoes until tender. Mash them in a bowl.
2. Heat oil in a pan and add cumin, coriander, turmeric, and red chili powder. Sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the Spanish paella rice to the pan and sauté for 2 minutes.
4. Mix the cooked rice with the mashed potatoes, onion, ginger, lemon juice, and salt.
5. Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions and shape into patties.
6. Heat oil in a non-stick pan and fry the patties until golden brown and crispy.
7. Flip the patties and fry the other side until crispy.
8. Serve hot with your favorite chutney or raita.
